summary: Iteration 10: Tested Unified CashBook Design. Entry form on left side (not modal), Credit/Debit toggle, Category dropdown for Debit, + New Party inline creation, Payment Mode buttons, Today/Week/Month filters, Date picker, Delete transaction. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright.
passed_tests: GET /api/parties - Returns parties list for dropdown
POST /api/transactions - Create debit entry with category
POST /api/transactions with party_id - Updates party balance
GET /api/cashbook/{date} - Returns daily cashbook with opening/closing balance
All payment modes (cash, upi, bank_transfer) work
All expense categories (salary, rent, electricity, supplies, chit_fund, other) work
Chit Fund transactions visible in CashBook
critical_code_review_comments: Entry form always visible on left side - good UX for frequent data entry
Credit/Debit toggle with visual feedback (green/red colors)
Category dropdown only shows in Debit mode - correct behavior
+ New Party creates party inline without leaving the page
Expense by Category summary shows at bottom in Debit mode
Hindi/Hinglish labels throughout (नई एंट्री, लेन-देन, श्रेणी, etc.)
Chit Fund entries from other modules visible in unified view
Toast messages in Hinglish (Credit entry add ho gayi!)
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified CashBook design fully tested. New test file: /app/backend/tests/test_cashbook_unified.py covers all CashBook APIs. Key features: (1) Entry form on left side (not modal), (2) Credit/Debit toggle, (3) Category dropdown for Debit entries, (4) + New Party inline creation, (5) Today/Week/Month filters, (6) Expense by Category summary in Debit mode.

entry_form_on_left.description: Entry form always visible on left side, not in modal

credit_debit_toggle.description: Toggle buttons to switch between Credit (Jama) and Debit (Udhar)
credit_debit_toggle.visual_feedback: Green for Credit, Red for Debit

category_dropdown.description: Category dropdown appears only in Debit mode

new_party_inline.description: + New Party button shows input field to create party inline

expense_by_category_summary.description: Shows expense totals by category at bottom in Debit mode

chit_fund_integration.description: Chit Fund entries from other modules visible in transactions list
